data.title: Reliance Industries Clears FY26 Accounts, Proposes Rs 6 Dividend
data.description:

Reliance Industries Limited ( (IN:RELIANCE) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Reliance Industries Limited’s board has approved the company’s audited standalone and consolidated financial statements and results for the quarter and full year ended 31 March 2026, following a recommendation by its audit committee. The auditors have issued unmodified opinions on these results, reinforcing the reliability of the reported financial performance for shareholders and the broader market.

The board has also recommended a dividend of Rs 6 per equity share with a face value of Rs 10 for the 2025-26 financial year, subject to shareholder approval at the upcoming annual general meeting. The decision signals continued capital return to investors and provides income visibility for shareholders, while the company plans to announce the AGM and dividend payment dates in due course.

More about Reliance Industries Limited

Reliance Industries Limited is one of India’s largest diversified conglomerates, with interests spanning energy, petrochemicals, retail, and digital services. Listed on major Indian and international exchanges, the company is a bellwether for India’s corporate sector and a key holding for domestic and global institutional investors.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.title: ALSCO Pooling Service Outlines HKEX Guidance for Trading Resumption
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

ALSCO Pooling Service Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:2649) ) has provided an announcement.

ALSCO Pooling Service has disclosed resumption guidance from the Hong Kong Stock Exchange following a trading suspension in its H shares, centred on concerns over a RMB73 million term loan and related fund flows identified around the time of its March 2026 IPO. The company must complete an independent forensic investigation into the loan and audit issues, assess and disclose the impact on its business and financials, and take remedial actions to restore transparency.

The exchange is also requiring ALSCO to demonstrate the integrity and competence of its management, commission an independent internal control review to fix material deficiencies, publish all outstanding financial results, and prove ongoing compliance with key listing rules, including Rule 13.24. These steps are intended to safeguard investor confidence and ensure that shareholders and the market receive all material information needed to accurately assess the company’s position before trading can resume.

More about ALSCO Pooling Service Co., Ltd. Class H

ALSCO Pooling Service Co., Ltd. is a joint stock company incorporated in the People’s Republic of China and listed in Hong Kong, with its H shares traded on the Main Board of the Stock Exchange of Hong Kong. The group provides pooling-related services and operates within the broader logistics and asset-utilization sector, serving customers that rely on efficient management of pooled resources and associated financial arrangements.

Average Trading Volume: 2,282,350

An announcement from JB Hunt ( (JBHT) ) is now available.

At J.B. Hunt Transport Services, Inc.’s annual meeting of shareholders held on April 23, 2026, investors elected all nominated directors to serve one-year terms, with each candidate receiving a substantial majority of votes cast despite some variation in support levels. The board slate, including executives and independent directors, thereby remains intact, signaling continuity in the company’s governance and strategic oversight.

Shareholders also approved on an advisory basis the company’s executive compensation program and overwhelmingly ratified PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as the independent registered public accounting firm for the 2026 calendar year. No additional business was brought before the meeting, underscoring broad investor alignment with current management, pay practices, and financial reporting oversight.

data.title: Zapata Computing Raises $15 Million to Expand Quantum Platform
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Zapata Computing Holdings ( (ZPTA) ) is now available.

On April 23, 2026, Zapata Quantum announced it had completed an oversubscribed $15 million strategic financing led by venture firm Triatomic Capital, with participation from other investors, marking the final milestone in a year-long restructuring. The funding, seen by management as a vote of confidence from long-term backers, will be used to scale the company’s hardware-agnostic quantum software platform and expand its science, engineering, product and commercial teams as it seeks to close the gap between rapid hardware progress and validated enterprise applications.

The company highlighted its growing role in the application layer of quantum computing, pointing to work with Fortune 500 clients, government agencies and a 2025 Nature Biotechnology cover study on quantum-enabled drug discovery targeting the KRAS mutation as evidence of its capabilities. By leveraging AI-native development practices and academic collaborations such as its partnership with the University of Maryland on formal algorithm validation, Zapata aims to strengthen its position in the emerging market for quantum utility and advance its status as a foundational platform provider for high-value quantum use cases.

Spark’s Take on ZPTA Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ZPTA is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held down by weak financial performance (zero revenue in 2025, persistent losses, negative equity, and ongoing cash burn) and highly unfavorable valuation (extremely high P/E). Technicals are mixed with only modest near-term momentum, while the recent financing is a partial positive for liquidity but highlights continued funding reliance.

To see Spark’s full report on ZPTA stock, click here.

More about Zapata Computing Holdings

Zapata Quantum, based in Boston and trading over the counter as ZPTA, is a hardware-agnostic, pure-play quantum software company focused on accelerating quantum application development for enterprises and government. Spun out of Harvard’s Quantum Computing Lab in 2017, it holds more than 60 granted and pending patents and works across domains including cryptography, pharmaceuticals, finance, materials discovery and defense, helping Fortune 500 clients and public-sector agencies turn quantum advances into practical solutions.

Average Trading Volume: 99,053

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: $115.4M

They further endorsed amendments to the 2009 Stock Incentive Plan, a move that may enhance Silicon Labs’ ability to attract and retain talent and align employee incentives with long-term shareholder interests.

On April 24, 2026, Maris-Tech Ltd. announced it had secured a pilot order from a U.S.-based customer, placed through an authorized reseller, for its drones OEM module to support a loitering munitions use case. The pilot will test integration of the company’s edge AI video module into next-generation unmanned systems, enabling real-time video processing and onboard intelligence under demanding operational conditions.

The order underscores Maris-Tech’s growing role in drone-based intelligence applications and its strategic expansion in the U.S. defense and security market. By channeling the deal through its reseller ecosystem, the company highlights a scalable go-to-market model that could deepen its presence in mission-critical scenarios where size, weight, power, and latency constraints are decisive for system performance.

data.title: China SCE Sets 2026 AGM to Approve 2025 Results and Renew Share Issue Mandate
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from China SCE Group Holdings ( (HK:1966) ).

China SCE Group Holdings has convened its annual general meeting for 28 May 2026 in Hong Kong, where shareholders will be asked to receive and approve the audited consolidated financial statements for the year ended 31 December 2025, along with the reports of the board and external auditors. The meeting will also consider the re-election of retiring directors, the re-appointment of Prism Hong Kong Limited as auditors for 2026, and the renewal of a mandate allowing the board to issue up to 20% of the company’s issued share capital, excluding treasury shares, which could provide flexibility for future financing and capital management.

The proposed general mandate to allot, issue and deal with additional shares, including potential convertible instruments, would empower the board to respond more swiftly to market opportunities and funding needs within defined limits. For investors and other stakeholders, the AGM resolutions collectively address continuity in governance and audit oversight, while preserving room for potential equity-based transactions that may influence the company’s capital structure.

More about China SCE Group Holdings

China SCE Group Holdings Limited is a Cayman Islands-incorporated company listed in Hong Kong under stock code 1966. The group operates in the Chinese property sector, with its business conducted through various subsidiaries whose audited consolidated financial statements are presented annually to shareholders for approval.

Average Trading Volume: 1,069,303

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: HK$278.7M

data.title: Telomir Pharmaceuticals Completes TELI Acquisition, Expands Telomir-1 Rights
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Telomir Pharmaceuticals, Inc. ( (TELO) ) has issued an update.

On April 22, 2026, Telomir Pharmaceuticals, Inc. completed its previously approved acquisition of TELI Pharmaceuticals, Inc., issuing 34,389,710 restricted common shares to former TELI shareholders based on independently derived valuations. The deal, endorsed by Telomir shareholders on March 23, 2026, was structured under securities law exemptions and included a $1 million contribution at closing from TELI shareholder Bayshore Trust.

Bayshore Trust also agreed to an additional option to invest up to $4 million tied to future milestones, including FDA acceptance of an Investigational New Drug application for Telomir-1 and the start of a Phase 1/2 clinical trial. The acquisition consolidates all global rights to Telomir-1 under Telomir Pharmaceuticals, eliminating prior geographic fragmentation and giving the company unified control over development and potential commercialization in key international markets.

The most recent analyst rating on (TELO) stock is a Buy with a $8.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Telomir Pharmaceuticals, Inc. stock, see the TELO Stock Forecast page.

More about Telomir Pharmaceuticals, Inc.

Telomir Pharmaceuticals, Inc. is a biotechnology company focused on the development of Telomir-1 (also known as Telomir-Zn), a therapeutic platform with rights spanning major international markets. The company operates in the pharmaceutical and life sciences sector, concentrating on advancing Telomir-1 through regulatory milestones and clinical development toward potential commercialization.

Average Trading Volume: 103,665

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $47.45M

data.title: Tompkins Financial Posts Record First-Quarter 2026 Earnings
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Tompkins Financial Corporation ( (TMP) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Tompkins Financial Corporation reported record first-quarter 2026 results on April 24, 2026, with diluted earnings per share rising 32.8% year over year to $1.82 and net income climbing 32.5% to $26.1 million, driven by higher net interest income, improved net interest margin and solid loan and deposit growth. Performance was supported by a 3.57% net interest margin, lower funding costs, strong capital ratios and generally stable credit quality, while the sale of Tompkins Insurance Agencies in late 2025 reduced noninterest income but also cut expenses, and the board declared a dividend of $0.67 per share on April 23, 2026, payable May 15 to shareholders of record on May 8.

Net interest margin expansion reflected reinvestment of securities at higher yields, growth in commercial real estate and commercial and industrial loans, and lower average costs for deposits and other interest-bearing liabilities. Asset quality indicators remained solid, with modest net charge-offs, lower nonperforming asset levels than a year earlier and allowance coverage above 100% of nonperforming loans, while capital ratios stayed well above regulatory well-capitalized thresholds, underscoring balance-sheet strength despite the loss of insurance-related fee income.

The most recent analyst rating on (TMP) stock is a Buy with a $87.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Tompkins Financial Corporation stock, see the TMP Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TMP Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TMP is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by improved profitability and balance-sheet leverage, tempered by a significant cash-flow deterioration that raises earnings-quality risk. Valuation is a major positive (low P/E and solid yield), while technical indicators point to weak near-term momentum; corporate updates are broadly positive but secondary.

To see Spark’s full report on TMP stock, click here.

More about Tompkins Financial Corporation

Tompkins Financial Corporation is a regional financial services company headquartered in Ithaca, N.Y., operating as a community banking organization listed on the NYSE American under the ticker TMP. The company focuses on providing commercial and consumer banking services, including loans, deposit products and related financial services, with a balance-sheet-driven model emphasizing net interest income and conservative capital and asset quality metrics.

Average Trading Volume: 70,685

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $1.22B
